questions.question: 506 leads unassigned + SynthFlow not connected. Leo WO in flight. What's your priority signal for this week?

options.A: SynthFlow + GHL wiring is #1 — block everything else until done
options.B: Keep it moving but don't block other sprints
options.C: Manually assign the 506 leads to Bailey/Keith first, then wire SynthFlow
options.D: Hold — review pipeline quality before auto-assigning

questions.rationale: Lead Processing at 22% is the biggest autonomy gap. Every day of delay = cold leads losing conversion probability by 80%.
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Processing 22% -> 70%+ is the single biggest Advaita autonomy unlock

questions.question: IC Investor Headlines adset at $76/lead (target $45). New community-hub creative ready. What's your call?

options.A: Pause Investor Headlines immediately — stop the bleeding now
options.B: Run both in parallel for 48hrs then decide
options.C: Kill IC ads entirely until creative is proven
options.D: Reduce IC budget 50% while testing new creative

questions.rationale: Leo WO ts 1777986496 already sets up parallel test. Pausing immediately risks losing momentum; parallel 48hr test gives data before full kill.
questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Acquisition — IC CPL needs to hit <$50 to scale the funnel

questions.question: 5.2 weeks zero-deal runway. What's the #1 action to close deals faster this week?

options.A: Daily pipeline review with Bailey/Keith — hold them accountable on Discovery Day conversions
options.B: Activate SynthFlow speed-to-lead so hot leads get called in 60 seconds
options.C: Run a re-engagement campaign on the 21 Financial Review and 12 Biz Plan leads

questions.rationale: 5.2 weeks is critical. Each track attacks a different bottleneck: speed-to-lead fixes top-of-funnel, re-engagement targets near-close leads, accountability drives close rate.
questions.advaita_alignment: Financial Control — runway survival requires pipeline velocity this week

questions.advaita_alignment: Lead Acquisition — Google Ads adds a non-Meta lead channel for IC/SH/FKI

questions.question: LinkedIn recovery ends tomorrow. 15 posts ready. What cadence do you want for the next 7 days?

options.A: Stick to the 4-3-2-1 plan: 1 post/day Tue-Fri at 7:30 AM or 12 PM MDT
options.B: 2 posts/day to make up for the recovery gap
options.C: Post only the 5 scheduled LinkedIn posts, hold the rest
options.D: Skip this week — focus on deals not content
